metadata.claim_boundary: Installs and starts the Windows agent service for lab validation. When no token is provided it creates a one-use installation token from tamandua-ctl credentials. Does not execute ML detection workloads by itself.

steps.name: prepare
steps.stdout_tail:
Microsoft Windows [versÆo 10.0.26200.8655]
(c) Microsoft Corporation. Todos os direitos reservados.

D:\Windows\System32>@echo off
mkdir "D:\ProgramData\Tamandua\qga-foreground" 2>nul
sc stop TamanduaAgent >nul 2>nul
taskkill /IM tamandua-agent.exe /T /F >nul 2>nul
ping -n 6 127.0.0.1 >nul
sc delete TamanduaAgent >nul 2>nul
attrib -R "D:\ProgramData\Tamandua\qga-foreground\tamandua-agent.exe" >nul 2>nul
del "D:\ProgramData\Tamandua\qga-foreground\tamandua-agent.exe" >nul 2>nul
del "D:\ProgramData\Tamandua\qga-foreground\agent.out.log" "D:\ProgramData\Tamandua\qga-foreground\agent.err.log" 2>nul
exit /b 0

steps.name: download
steps.stdout_tail:
Microsoft Windows [versÆo 10.0.26200.8655]
(c) Microsoft Corporation. Todos os direitos reservados.

D:\Windows\System32>@echo off
curl.exe -f -L --max-time 90 -o "D:\ProgramData\Tamandua\qga-foreground\tamandua-agent.exe" "http://192.168.12.146:4000/downloads/agents/tamandua-agent-windows-x64.exe"
if errorlevel 1 exit /b 23
if not exist "D:\ProgramData\Tamandua\qga-foreground\tamandua-agent.exe" exit /b 2
exit /b 0

steps.name: start
steps.stdout_tail:
Microsoft Windows [versÆo 10.0.26200.8655]
(c) Microsoft Corporation. Todos os direitos reservados.

D:\Windows\System32>@echo off
"D:\ProgramData\Tamandua\qga-foreground\tamandua-agent.exe" start >"D:\ProgramData\Tamandua\qga-foreground\agent.out.log" 2>"D:\ProgramData\Tamandua\qga-foreground\agent.err.log"
ping -n 12 127.0.0.1 >nul
exit /b 0
steps.stderr_tail: O arquivo j  est  sendo usado por outro processo.
